understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of KA59 is to complete each puzzle level by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') simultaneously. The whole game is won once the final level reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN to shift the currently selected piece one step in pixel coordinates (3 pixels per grid cell). Some objects are pushable and will shift along when the selected piece moves into them, while walls and boundaries block movement in varying ways. CLICK with a target_position switches control to another selectable piece at those exact pixel coordinates, allowing multiple pieces to be positioned. The semantic_grid displays P (current), S (other selectable), B (block), # (wall), + (goal), and . (empty) to reflect the cell-based state.
